goog.module('jsenum.IntJsEnum.$Overlay$impl');

const Enums = goog.require('javaemul.internal.Enums$impl');

let BoxedLightEnum = goog.forwardDeclare('javaemul.internal.Enums.BoxedLightEnum$impl');
let IntJsEnum = goog.forwardDeclare('jsenum.IntJsEnum$impl');

/** @nodts */
class $Overlay {
 /** @final @nodts @return {number} */
 static m_getValue__$devirt__jsenum_IntJsEnum__int(/** !IntJsEnum */ $thisArg) {
  $Overlay.$clinit();
  return /**@type {number}*/ ($thisArg);
 }
 /** @nodts */
 static $clinit() {
  $Overlay.$clinit = () =>{};
  $Overlay.$loadModules();
 }
 /** @nodts @return {boolean} */
 static $isInstance(/** ? */ instance) {
  return Enums.m_isInstanceOf__java_lang_Object__javaemul_internal_Constructor__boolean(instance, $Overlay);
 }
 
 /** @nodts */
 static $loadModules() {}
}
$Util.$setClassMetadata($Overlay, 'jsenum.IntJsEnum');
